care.summary: Often called the 'indestructible' houseplant, the ZZ Plant thrives on neglect and features thick, dark green, glossy leaves.
care.light: Tolerates very low light, but does best in bright, indirect light.
care.water: Water very sparingly. Allow the soil to dry out completely between waterings.
care.humidity: Average household humidity is perfectly fine.
care.fertilizer: Feed every 6 months with a diluted houseplant fertilizer.
care.toxicity: Toxic to cats and dogs if ingested.
common_issues: Yellowing leaves and mushy stems from overwatering (the most common cause of death)
tips: When in doubt, do not water it. The rhizomes store water for months.
Wipe the leaves to keep them shiny.
